mapper.select: SELECT SAKey, FoodName, Price, Recommend, Best, Premium, Season FROM Menu
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Menu (saKey, foodName, price, recommend, best, premium, season) VALUES (#{SAKey}, #{FoodName}, #{Price}, #{Recommend}, #{Best}, #{Premium}, #{Season})
mapper.update: UPDATE Menu SET price = #{Price}, recommend = #{Recommend}, best = #{Best}, premium = #{Premium}, season = #{Season} WHERE saKey = #{SAKey} AND foodName = #{FoodName}
